name: Schnitzel
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound thin veal or pork chops to about 3/8" thickness, placing the chop between two sheets of plastic wrap if necessary.
2. In a bowl, mix flour with salt, pepper, and paprika.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and milk.
4. Dip the chopped meat first in the seasoned flour mixture, then in the egg-milk mixture, and finally coat with breadcrumbs.
5. Heat olive oil and butter in a large frying pan until hot enough to sizzle when food is added.
6. Fry the schnitzels until golden brown on both sides. If there is a bone in the chop, transfer it to an oven preheated to 425°F (220°C) and bake for about 5-8 minutes.
7. Serve with lemon slices, sauerkraut, or mashed potatoes.
